column1: Saregama is the oldest music label company from India (established 1902, erstwhile "Gramophone Company of India" & then "HMV"). The company is aiming to be a pure-play content company supported by the global consumption boom. [1] Since 2017, Saregama has been making headlines again owing to the launch of two unique initiatives, Saregama Carvaan and Yoodlee Films. [2]
